description: Foundations Patch 4 (17 June 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Resilience amount is no longer displayed as a buff on players during combat

sections.searchable_text: Changes Resilience amount is no longer displayed as a buff on players during combat

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Divine Engine (Energy Shaper) Channel Time: 4s → 3.3s Number of ticks: 13 → 11 Damage per tick vs players: 80 → 96 Damage per tick vs mobs: 26 → 57

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs) Number of ticks: 10 → 8 Damage per tick vs players: 78 → 98 Damage per tick vs mobs: 39 → 49

subsections.heading: Daggers

subitems.text: When hitting a player below 40% health, cooldown is now reduced by 50%

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) When hitting a player below 40% health, cooldown is now reduced by 50% Cooldown: 30s → 35s

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Pyroblast (one-handed Fire Staffs) 0s Channel Damage: 200 → 190 0.6s Channel Damage: 280 → 266 1.2s Channel Damage: 360 → 342

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Grasp of the Undead (Tombhammer) Added Hitpoint Reduction: 10% Hitpoint Reduction Duration: 3s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Movespeed buff now ends upon auto-attacking
Cooldown reduction per player hit: 12% → 15% (stacks up to 3 times)
Now deals 80 damage to all untargeted enemies hit
Hitting a player now reduces the ability’s cooldown by 20%

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Stun Run (all Quarterstaffs) Movespeed buff now ends upon auto-attacking Rising Blow (all Quarterstaffs) Cooldown reduction per player hit: 12% → 15% (stacks up to 3 times) Separator (all Quarterstaffs) Now deals 80 damage to all untargeted enemies hit Soaring Swipe (Double Bladed Staff) Cooldown: 20s → 25s Hitting a player now reduces the ability’s cooldown by 20% Area Radius: 6m → 5m

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage: 124 → 109 Tectonic Shift (Earthrune Staff) Hitpoint reduction: 15% → 10%

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Harpoon (all Spears) Max range: 18m → 20m Projectile speed: 23.33 m/s → 23.53 m/s

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Fearless Strike (Carving Sword) Damage: 150.10 → 135 Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) Auto-Attack Damage Increase buff: 100% → 65% Attack Speed buff: 50% → 30% Damage buff duration: 3s → 4s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes After Image (Mistwalker Shoes) 1st Cast Cooldown: 15s → 12s Royal March (Royal Boots) Movement Speed per Stack: 8% → 9%

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Crossbows Divine Engine (Energy Shaper) Cursed Staffs Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs) Daggers Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) Fire Staffs Pyroblast (one-handed Fire Staffs) Hammers Grasp of the Undead (Tombhammer) Quarterstaffs Stun Run (all Quarterstaffs) Rising Blow (all Quarterstaffs) Separator (all Quarterstaffs) Soaring Swipe (Double Bladed Staff) Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Tectonic Shift (Earthrune Staff) Spears Harpoon (all Spears) Swords Fearless Strike (Carving Sword) Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) Helmets Immortal (Mistwalker Hood) Shoes After Image (Mistwalker Shoes) Royal March (Royal Boots)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where Soaring Swipe (Double Bladed Staff) slow effect would also apply to enemies in an area around the intended targets
Fixed issue where Tectonic Slam (Earthrune Staffs) did not apply debuff icon to enemies to indicate health reduction
Fixed issue where Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staffs) would inflict too much damage and an unintended slow effect
Fixed issue where “Required for” section was missing from Artifact item details
Fixed issue where items in Eralia Wayfarer’s menu would not display correctly by tier after deselecting "Show craftable from inventory only"
Fixed issue where the countdown banner was not displayed during a duel

items.text: Fixed issue where guild logos would sometimes not display correctly when entering a crowded region
Fixed issue where chests in Heretic dungeons could not be opened without first destroying Volatile Barrels
Fixed issue where the Arena search for a group would reset if a party member accepted a match while gathering, fishing, or opening a Tome

subitems.text: Accepting an Arena match is no longer possible while engaged in those actions

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where faction zerg markers on the minimap would display the wrong color
